subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-12-29 in London
subcodes.first_line: This diversity is of two kinds. The first kind of diversity involves innate and temperamental differences, which do not preclude the establishment of unviersal concord
subcodes.first_line_orig: این اختلاف بر دو قسم است قسمی اختلاف اصلی و خلقی است و آن مانع ظهور اتحاد و الفت عمومی نیست
subcodes.subjects: @unity in diversity, @diversity an attribute; requirement of existence, @unity; oneness of humanity, @universal peace; world unity, @education of children; moral education
